characters.name: Character Guide
characters.description: The following is alist of charactersinT.U.F.F. Puppy. These characters are members of theTurbo Undercover Fighting Force(known as T.U.F.F.) , a crime fighting agency for good inPetropolis. These characters are members of other agencies that work alongside T.U.F.F., and also fight against crime.

characters.name: Agent Amoeba
characters.description: Agent Amoebais aT.U.F.F.agent who was only mentioned inLie Like a Dog. He helpedThe Chiefduring Spackle and Grout Day at T.U.F.F. Being an amoeba, he is so small that none of the T.U.F.F. agents can see him.

characters.name: Agent Bacon
characters.description: Agent Bacon andDudley. Agent Baconis a pig agent who has only appeared inSuper Duper Crime Busters. It was shown that knitting is a hobby of his. However, he had no lines of dialogue.

characters.name: Agent Bacon
characters.description: Agent Bacon andDudley. Agent Baconis a pig agent who has only appeared inSuper Duper Crime Busters. It was shown that knitting is a hobby of his. However, he had no lines of dialogue.

characters.name: Agent Bossy
characters.description: Agent Bossy Agent Bossyis a cow agent who first appeared inMall Rat, when Dudley said that surfing the web for meat would be insensitive to her. She also has a cameo inThe Wrong Stuffand'Til Doom Do Us Part. She is voiced byGrey DeLisle.

characters.name: Agent Bossy

characters.name: Agent Bull
characters.description: Agent Bull is about to charge at Dudley. Agent Bullis a bull agent who worked forT.U.F.F.Whenever he seesDudleydressed as a matador in red, Agent Bull sees this and gets really angry and begins to charge at Dudley. He only appeared inHappy Howl-O-Weenso far.

characters.name: Agent Deer
characters.description: Agent Deer licking Kitty's food. Agent Deeris a deer agent who appeared only inHush Puppy. He was seen licking food out ofKitty's hand, but then Kitty gets upset and asks him to leave because it creeps her out. He was seen the second time licking her hand and then Kitty angrily asks him to leave.

characters.name: Agent Goldfish
characters.description: Agent Goldfish Agent Goldfishis a goldfish agent who only appeared inThunder Dog. Not much is known about her, but it is shown that she's afraid of toilets. She is voiced byGrey DeLisle.

characters.name: Agent Goldfish
characters.description: Agent Goldfish Agent Goldfishis a goldfish agent who only appeared inThunder Dog. Not much is known about her, but it is shown that she's afraid of toilets. She is voiced byGrey DeLisle.

characters.name: Agent Groundhog
characters.description: Agent Groundhog Agent Groundhogis a groundhog agent who made a cameo in the episodeHot Dog. He appeared to live under an office printer. It appears that he is the one who tells about the end of winter. He is voiced byJeff Bennett.

characters.name: Agent Groundhog

characters.name: Agent Guinea Pig
characters.description: On the right Agent Guinea Pig Agent Guinea Pigis aT.U.F.F.agent who appeared only inCandy Cane-ine. As his name suggests, his species is a guinea pig.

characters.name: Agent Hammerhead
characters.description: Agent Hammerhead Agent Hammerheadis aT.U.F.F.agent who has only appeared inPuppy Unplugged. As his name suggests, he is a hammerhead shark.

characters.name: Agent Hammerhead
characters.description: Agent Hammerhead Agent Hammerheadis aT.U.F.F.agent who has only appeared inPuppy Unplugged. As his name suggests, he is a hammerhead shark.

characters.name: Agent Jumbo
characters.description: Agent Jumbo Agent Jumbois an agent working for theTurbo Undercover Fighting Force(T.U.F.F.) who is an Indian tuskless elephant. She is voiced byGrey DeLisle. Agent Jumbo is a T.U.F.F. agent that has musophobia (fear of mice and rats). This means that when she seesAgent Rodentski, she always jumps in fear and ends up accidentally crushingthe Chief. InShare-A-Lair, Dudley told the Chameleon to change into Agent Rodentski, which resulted in Jumbo crushing and nearly killing him.

characters.name: Agent Kid
characters.description: Agent Kid Agent Kidis aT.U.F.F.agent who appeared only inPup Daddy. As his name suggests, his species is a goat.Kittywas tellingDudleythat he needs to be more responsible and said that Agent Kid is more responsible than him even though he eats cans. Then, Agent Kid was seen eating cans.

characters.name: Agent Meow Meow & Agent Bark Bark
characters.description: "Meow meow.""Bark bark.""Our names are what we say." Agent Meow Meow & Agent Bark Barkare clones ofDudley PuppyandKitty Katswell. They're appeared once in the episodeWhile The Cats Away. Just like the originals, Meow Meow & Bark Bark are voiced byGrey DeLisleandJerry Trainor. Being the clones of Kitty and Dudley, respectively, Meow Meow & Bark Bark have the same physical appearances as them, with three major differences are that their fur colors are more saturated, their eyes are often misaligned, and they sometimes shoot lasers out of their eyes, noses, mouths and butts.

characters.name: Agent Moby
characters.description: Agent Moby Agent Mobyis a whale agent who appeared inA Doomed Christmas. LikeAgent Jumbo, he smashedThe Chiefby accident. He is voiced byMatthew W. Taylor.

characters.name: Agent Moby
characters.description: Agent Moby Agent Mobyis a whale agent who appeared inA Doomed Christmas. LikeAgent Jumbo, he smashedThe Chiefby accident. He is voiced byMatthew W. Taylor.

characters.name: Agent Nutz
characters.description: Agent Nutz Agent Nutzis a squirrel agent who, inPurr-fect Partners, was a gag whenKittyasked, "Are you nuts?" to whichThe Chiefanswered, "No, Agent Nutz is over there." In other episodes, he serves as a visual gag whenever he freaks out about something completely random and often blows it up with his blaster. He is voiced byJeff Bennett. Agent Nutz

characters.name: Agent Rodentski
characters.description: Agent Rodentski Agent Rodentskiis a small mouse who is a field agent that works forT.U.F.F.as well as being one of theThe Chameleon's disguises (it is unknown if there is a real Agent Rodentski or if this was The Chameleon the entire time).Agent Jumbois apparently afraid of him. Rodentski has only appeared inShare-A-Lair. He is voiced byButch Hartman.

characters.name: Agent Sea Cucumber
characters.description: Agent Sea Cucumberis aT.U.F.F.agent who was seen only in the episodeActing TUFF. He doesn't have any speaking lines. He is a green-coloredsea cucumberwho wears a black leather jacket over a white shirt, jeans and black boots. He also has black hair styled with a cowlick. Agent Sea Cucumber lives in a fishbowl, similarly toAgent Goldfish. However, his fishbowl has a jukebox inside it.

characters.name: Agent Seabiscuit
characters.description: Agent Seabiscuit Agent Seabiscuitis a horse agent who only appeared inThe Dog Who Cried Fish. He was shown when he was offended byThe Chief's quote when he said, "I'm so hungry I could eat a horse." He is voiced byDaran Norris. It is unknown if he will appear again. And he is also known as accountable, good-hearted, educated, no-nonsense, trustworthy, sympathetic, encouraging, affectionate, benevolent, independent, sweet, confident, understanding, industrious, truthful, attentive, gentlemanly, eager, noble, thoughtful, selfless, even-tempered, assertive, brainy, intellectual, sincere, caring, upbeat, idealistic and tidy.

characters.name: Agent Skunk
characters.description: Agent Skunk. Agent Skunkis aT.U.F.F.agent who appeared only inT.U.F.F. Choices. He is adverse to being wakened up, as he probably sprayedKeswickafter he woke him up in the middle of the night.

characters.name: Agent Weaselman
characters.description: Agent Weaselman Agent Weaselmanis a field agent that works forD.O.O.M.as well as being one ofThe Chameleon's disguises (it is unknown if there is a real Agent Weaselman or if this was The Chameleon for the entire time). He has only appeared inShare-A-Lair. In the episode, Agent Weaselman warned D.O.O.M. aboutT.U.F.F.trying to destroy them. Agent Weaselman speaks with a thick German accent and is voiced byButch Hartman.

characters.name: Agent Weaselman

Agent Weaselman speaks with a thick German accent and is voiced byButch Hartman.

characters.name: Agreeable Kitty
characters.description: Agreeable Kittyis a carbon base copy of Kitty Katswell. She appears once in the episodeCarbon Copies. Like the original Kitty she is voiced byGrey DeLisle. Being a copy of Kitty Katswell, Agreeable Kitty has the same physical appearance as Kitty. She was created by Dudley when he used Keswick's new simulation station when he lied sayingKittysaid it was ok for him to use it. Later she, along with the carbon copies of Michael Crane and The President escape the station whenDudleyreopened it and forgot to close the door. When Dudley is at his cubical he spotted Agreeable Kitty and recognize her as she as she gave him a gumball. Later when Dudley planed to put her back in,Keswickrevealed that the copies of Crane and the President has escape and enter the real world. As Dudley and Kitty prepared to get the copies, Keswick was told to put Agreeable Kitty back in the station, only for him to overuse her to get a gumball he wanted and she exploded.

characters.name: Al Croaker
characters.description: Al Croaker Al Croakeris a weatherman who has only appeared inCold Fish. Al was seen announcing the weather for the Riceberg Ice Bird Iceberg whenDudleyandKittywere going to head over there. He was voiced byJeff Bennett.

characters.name: Aliens
characters.description: The alien forms of Dudley and Kitty. The alien forms ofDudley PuppyandKitty Katswellwere seen inPuppy Unpluggedwhen they rescued Kitty, Dudley, and Bird Brain from being pulled into the sun.Keswicktraded Kitty and Dudley's DNA samples with an alien race in exchange for an unauthorized self-recharging power source.

characters.name: Arts and Crafts Badger
characters.description: TheArts and Crafts Badgeris a character onQuacky the Duckwho teaches kids about arts and crafts. The character was only mentioned byDudleyinKid Stuff, and never physically appeared in the episode.

characters.name: Bad Dog
characters.description: Bad Dog Bad Dogis apit bullD.O.O.M.agent who wears a Punisher-looking T-shirt. He has not had any speaking roles. UnlikeLeather Teddy, he does not have any signature weapons. He hasn't appeared in any episodes afterSeason 1.

characters.name: Bad Dog
characters.description: Bad Dog Bad Dogis apit bullD.O.O.M.agent who wears a Punisher-looking T-shirt. He has not had any speaking roles. UnlikeLeather Teddy, he does not have any signature weapons. He hasn't appeared in any episodes afterSeason 1.

characters.name: Bat
characters.description: Bat Bat(also once called "Mr. Bat" by Bird Brain) is a henchman ofBird Brain. Bat's first appearance was inThunder Dogwhere he helped his boss steal equipment to build condos. He is a gray, furry creature with long, bunny-like ears. He wears a tuxedo and black glasses. He also has a pig-like nose. Bat is blind because of the common saying "You're as blind as a bat". Due to this fact, Bat constantly asks "Where?" in response to orders. This answer annoys Bird Brain. However at one point he was ordered to do something and completed the task without a problem or saying where.
